overall.description: Game footage from Assassin's Creed Valhalla depicting a Viking longship approaching a medieval settlement along a river, docking at a wooden pier, and the protagonist exploring the village on foot. The scene transitions from open water to a bustling wooden settlement with traditional Norse architecture.

events.description: boat slows down as it approaches the wooden dock structures
longship arrives at wooden dock and prepares to moor

agents.ego_description: standing at the prow of the Viking longship, navigating the river toward the settlement

entered.detail: tall wooden palisade walls on hillside with watchtowers
stone church with pointed roof visible above the fortress walls
wooden longship with carved dragon prow and green sail covers
medieval wooden pier with mooring posts and crane mechanisms
traditional wooden buildings with straw roofs along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a Viking longship sailing along a river toward a medieval settlement. The camera follows from behind the character standing at the ship's prow. Wooden fortress walls and a stone church tower rise on the left hillside, while the wooden dock structures of the settlement come into view on the right. The boat slows as it approaches the mooring area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village dock and market square

events.description: character disembarks from longship onto wooden dock and begins walking
entering village center with large stone Celtic crosses and increased NPC activity

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden dock area and into the village, passing market stalls and stone monuments

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden crate near a market stall
group of villagers walking along the dirt path ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with gaps between boards
canvas canopy over wooden market stall with goods displayed
large stone cross with intricate knotwork design standing in village center
wooden barrels and crates stacked near the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character disembarks from the longship onto a wooden dock and walks into a medieval settlement. The scene transitions from water to land, moving through a market area with canvas canopies and wooden stalls. Large stone Celtic crosses dominate the village center as the character passes NPC villagers going about their activities, with wooden houses and watchtowers visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open waters of a river into the heart of a bustling medieval settlement. It begins behind a character standing at the prow of a Viking longship, gliding past fortress walls and a stone church tower on a hillside as the vessel slows toward a mooring area. As the ship reaches the shore, the perspective shifts from water to land while the character disembarks onto a wooden dock. The scene then expands into a village market filled with canvas canopies and wooden stalls, passing by active villagers and towering stone Celtic crosses. Finally, the movement carries the character deeper into the settlement, with traditional wooden houses and watchtowers framing the background.
